zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabell Lyle於1395年1月1日出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可時，她的父親Andrew Lyle18歲，母親Catherine Boyd20歲。她於1424年與Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1439年7月18日在蘇格蘭雷福福爾享年44歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabell Lyle于1395年1月1日出生在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可时，她的父亲Andrew Lyle18岁，母亲Catherine Boyd20岁。她于1424年与Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1439年7月18日在苏格兰雷福福爾享年44岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可。

nameMeanings.name: Lyle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): topographic or habitational name from Anglo-Norman French del isle ‘from the island’ (from Latin de insula), denoting someone who lived on an island or who came from a place in France named Ile, Isle, or L'Isle. The surname may also in some cases be from Lille (Nord). Compare Lisle and Iles .

variants.name: Lyles
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Lyle   1.

variants.name: Lisle
meanings: English (Northumberland, Durham, and Yorkshire): variant of   Lyle   and a cognate of 2 below.
French: habitational name from L'Isle or Lisle, names of several places in various parts of France, named with Old French isle ‘island’ (from Latin insula). Compare Delisle .

nameMeanings.name: Isabell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabell Lyle was born on 1 January 1395, in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, Andrew Lyle, was 18 and her mother, Catherine Boyd, was 20. She married Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock in 1424, in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 18 July 1439, in Renfrewshire, Scotland, at the age of 44, and was buried in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabell Lyle est née le 1 janvier 1395, à Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Andrew Lyle, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Catherine Boyd, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock en 1424, à Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 juillet 1439, à Renfrewshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabell Lyle am 1. Januar 1395 in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Andrew Lyle 18 und ihre Mutter Catherine Boyd 20. Sie hat 1424 in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. Juli 1439 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Renfrewshire, Scotland und wurde in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabell Lyle è nata il il 1 gennaio 1395 nel Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, sua padre, Andrew Lyle, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Catherine Boyd, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock nel 1424, nel Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 18 luglio 1439, nel Renfrewshire, Scotland, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolta a Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabell Lyleが1395年1月1日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマルノックで生まれた時，父Andrew Lyleは18歳，母Catherine Boydは20歳であった。1424年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマルノックでSir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1439年7月18日にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアで44歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマルノックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabell Lyle(이)가 1395년 1월 1일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬마노크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Andrew Lyle(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Boyd(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1424년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬마노크에서 Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1439년 7월 18일 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 킬마노크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabell Lyle nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1395, em Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Andrew Lyle, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Boyd, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock em 1424, em Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabell Lyle родилась 1 января 1395 г. в местности килмарнокк, аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Andrew Lyle было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Boyd, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas "The Brave" Boyd 5th of Kilmarnock в 1424 г. в местности килмарнокк, аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 18 июля 1439 г. в местности ренфрюшир, Шотландия в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности килмарнокк, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания.
